taglinePlatformOperator: Here's how the whole platform is performing today.
taglineNetworkAdmin: A bird's-eye view of every market in your media network.
taglineMarketManager: Everything happening across your market, at a glance.
taglineAccountLead: Here's what's moving across your account today.
taglineStoryteller: Let's turn your work into stories worth telling.
taglineContributor: Thanks for lending your voice — here's where to jump in.
taglineNewcomer: Let's discover the story your brand is ready to tell.
ctaDiscoverDesc: Drop in a website or an idea — we'll surface a story worth telling.
discoverFieldPlaceholder: Paste a URL or describe an idea…
ctaDiscoverWelcomeDesc: Paste your website or describe a cause, and watch a campaign-ready story take shape in minutes.
ctaManageOrganizationsDesc: Review and update the organizations in your portfolio.
ctaManageUsersDesc: Add teammates, set roles, and keep access tidy.
ctaInviteTeammateDesc: Bring a colleague on board to help build stories.
ctaBrowseCampaignsDesc: Track every story and its content across channels.
ctaViewTransactionsDesc: Follow orders, payments, and revenue as they land.
ctaAdRevenueDesc: See impressions, clicks, and revenue from your ad network.
ctaConnectDataDesc: Link your platforms to unlock richer analytics.
ctaSocialZernioDescription: Audit every market's social connection profile pointer in one place.
dictionaryIntro: What every number and action on your dashboard means.
dictionaryMetricsEmpty: No metrics are shown on your dashboard for your role yet.
dictStories: Every story in your account, counted across all workflow statuses — draft, in review, and published.
dictPublishedStories: Stories that have been published and are visible to audiences.
dictDraftStories: Stories created but not yet published — your active pipeline. Derived as total stories minus published stories.
dictOrganizations: Organizations in your portfolio that you have access to manage.
dictTeamMembers: People with a user account in your workspace, active or inactive.
dictPendingInvites: Invitations that have been sent but not yet accepted.
dictRevenue: The total value of all paid orders, summed across every story.
dictPaidOrders: The number of checkout orders that have been successfully paid.
dictAdRevenue: Revenue earned from your connected Google Ad Manager network over the last 30 days.
dictAdImpressions: Ad impressions served across your connected ad network over the last 30 days.
